projects.title: PetCare: All-in-One Pet Ecosystem
projects.description: A comprehensive digital platform for veterinary services and animal welfare. It centralizes grooming, training, adoption, and emergency services within a high-performance, modern interface.
features: Booking management system for grooming and specialized training
Adoption module with dynamic filters by species, size, and age
Integrated E-commerce store with a premium product catalog
Active community hub with consultation forums and veterinary tips
24/7 Emergency response section with integrated clinic locations

codeSnippets.title: Performance Optimization via Lazy Loading
Lightweight Animations with Framer Motion

projects.challenge: The main challenge was building a visually rich platform with fluid animations under a zero-budget infrastructure constraint, while ensuring fast load times (Low LCP) despite the use of videos and heavy media assets.
projects.solution: Implemented a 'Serverless-first' architecture leveraging Cloudinary for asset delivery and Railway for deployment. I integrated Intersection Observer for lazy loading images and videos, successfully reducing the initial page weight by 65% without sacrificing the aesthetic quality of the animations.

projects.title: Academic Survey System - ITSOEH
projects.description: A secure, role-based survey platform developed for the ITSOEH Technological University. It streamlines teacher evaluations and campus service assessments (cafeteria, infrastructure) with automated reporting.
features: Automated credential delivery via Brevo SMTP integration
Admin-only user provisioning and secure access control
Evaluation modules for teaching performance and campus services
Clean, institutional UI designed for accessibility and high usability

codeSnippets.title: Automated Email Credential Delivery
Role-Based Access Middleware

projects.challenge: Implementing a secure credential distribution system while managing concurrent database writes during peak evaluation periods (finals week).
projects.solution: Integrated Brevo for reliable SMTP delivery and optimized MongoDB aggregation pipelines to handle real-time statistical generation for administrative reports without performance lag.
